title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud announced AI-driven capabilities for Cloud SQL including automated health management and fleet-wide insights. The service supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server with focus on performance optimization, high availability, and security for mission-critical applications.
writeup: This video covers recent updates to Google Cloud SQL, the managed database service supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server. It outlines AI-driven capabilities including automated health management and fleet-wide insights, framed around performance optimization, high availability, and security for mission-critical applications. The key takeaways center on workflow automation and fleet monitoring as the mechanisms for managing database health at scale.
